text.title: AI-Pair Onboarding Script Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule id from content/01-core-rules.xml for ai-pair-onboarding-script.

decision-tree.root-question: Is this engineer a long-term contributor on an AI-pair-standardised team?

example.trace: Bootstrap on fresh laptop → claude v1.2.4 detected → AGENTS.md planted (sha256:...) → allowed_tools=[Read,Grep,Glob,Bash] → smoke task returns 3 bullets referencing `pyproject.toml` → ready_to_pair=true.
